DISCOVERY 610, TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO COMPEL TESTIMONY AT DEPOSITION IS GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART. THE MOTION IS GRANTED EXCEPT FOR THE QUESTION OF "IS THE RELOCATION PROGRAM IMPLEMENTED AT EACH AND EVERY BUILDING OPERATED BY CITIAPARTMENTS?" THE REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS IS DENIED. THE WITNESS IS ORDERED TO RESPOND TO THE SPECIFIED QUESTIONS ON OR BEFORE FEBRUARY 9, 2007. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (610/BEC) COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.

Off Calendar Feb-07-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
RAQUEL FOX, ESQ. OF TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC. FOR PLAINTIFFS/MOVING PARTIES, BEN SIMS, ET.AL.
NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT/OPPOSING PARTY.

TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff's motion to compel testimony at deposition is granted in part and denied in part. The motion is granted except for the question of "Is the relocation program implemented at each and every building operated by CitiApartments?" The request for monetary sanctions is denied. The witness is ordered to respond to the specified questions on or before February 9, 2007. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (610/BEC)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compeel Further Responses To Request For Production Of Documents And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Oct-05-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Dean Preston for plaintiff and moving party: Ben Sims
Edward C. Singer for defendant and opposing party: Citiapartments, Inc.

HEARING HELD and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiff Ben Sims' motion to compel further responses to request for production of documents.
2: Denied. The request is overbroad.
14: Denied. The request seeks information that is irrelevant to the subject matter and is not likely to lead to the discovery of admissible evidence.
21: Granted. If defendant has produced all responsive documents, that representation shall be verified.
27: Granted. If defendant has produced all responsive documents, that representation shall be verified. Any documents withheld pursuant to a claim of the attorney client or attorney work product privilege shall be identified in a privilege log.
30: Granted. Defendant may redact any financial information.
31, 33, 34: Granted.
32: Granted in part. Defendant shall produce portions of the agreement that relate to seller's disclosures to the buyer regarding the condition of the premises.
The request for monetary sanctions is denied. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-10-2006 Set For Trial On Feb-13-07 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Jan-25-07 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 604
